message:
feat(ssh): Implement SSH execution and transfer pipeline (bead u0o)

- Add rch-common/src/ssh.rs with SSH client, connection pooling,
  and remote command execution using openssh crate
- Add rch/src/transfer.rs with rsync + zstd file transfer,
  remote compilation execution, and artifact retrieval
- Add shellexpand, openssh, tokio, anyhow dependencies

Features:
- SshClient: Single worker SSH connection management
- SshPool: Connection pool for multiple workers
- TransferPipeline: File sync, remote execution, artifact retrieval
- Streaming command output support
- Health check functionality

All 39 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
